subcodes.first_line: O pilgrim with a fragrant soul, render praise unto God, for thou hast forsaken thy homeland and endured hardship and tribulation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائر مشکین نفس حمد کن خدا را که ترک وطن نمودی و تحمل مشقت و محن کردی طی
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God
